name: Veolia Energy
description: Veolia specializes in transforming waste into valuable resources, particularly through biomass, which directly aligns with the concept of waste-to-energy. The company's focus on sustainable energy sources and efficient consumption practices supports a low-carbon, circular economy.

name: Indaver België
description: Indaver specializes in creating energy from waste through its advanced incineration processes, offering sustainable and cost-efficient Total Waste Management solutions. With over 30 years of expertise, Indaver focuses on maximizing energy recovery and recycling, positioning itself as a leader in the waste-to-energy sector.

name: Waste Management
description: The company is involved in waste management, which is closely related to waste-to-energy initiatives.

name: Waste-to-Energy Association
description: The Waste-to-Energy Association (WTEA) represents the majority of modern waste-to-energy facilities in the U.S., which safely dispose of municipal solid waste while generating renewable electricity through advanced combustion technology. WTEA advocates for waste-to-energy as a vital part of sustainable waste management and supports community outreach and education on its benefits.

name: Covanta
description: Covanta is dedicated to innovative waste management solutions, emphasizing the benefits of Waste-to-Energy disposal. Their commitment to sustainability and advanced technology helps organizations improve their environmental footprint through effective waste recovery and recycling.

name: East Rockingham Waste to Energy
description: Hitachi Zosen Inova (HZI) is a leading player in the waste-to-energy (WTE) sector, providing comprehensive turnkey plants that convert residual waste into energy. Their projects, such as the East Rockingham WTE, not only address climate change but also promote a sustainable waste management system and create local jobs.

name: DEVISE ENGINEERING S.A.
description: DEVISE ENGINEERING specializes in the design and manufacture of advanced systems for water, wastewater, and sludge treatment, making it a key player in the environmental market. Their expertise includes offering innovative solutions for Waste-to-Energy projects, emphasizing their commitment to sustainable environmental practices.

name: Enprode Engineering & Construction
description: The company emphasizes its commitment to Waste-to-Energy (WtE) as a key business opportunity that promotes financial benefits and enhanced competitiveness while being environmentally sustainable.

name: Re Sustainability Limited
description: Re Sustainability Limited (RE) provides waste-to-energy solutions, emphasizing their commitment to sustainable environmental practices. With a strong presence in waste management and recycling services, the company plays a crucial role in the circular economy.

name: Wheelabrator Technologies
description: WIN Waste Innovations emphasizes its commitment to sustainability through innovative waste and recycling solutions. Their focus on delivering reliable service and advancing the waste management industry aligns with the principles of waste-to-energy initiatives.
